name: 11L VRL + LeakyReLU² + Full GPTQ + XSA-all(11) + EMA(0.997)
blurb: Value Residual Learning (VRL, arxiv:2410.17897) + LeakyReLU(0.5)² + Full GPTQ (Hessian-aware Cholesky inverse, IST-DASLab/gptq ICLR 2023) + QAT-export alignment + 2% magnitude pruning. 11L, XSA-all(11), EMA(0.997), Tight SWA, Partial RoPE(16/64), LN Scale, VE128, SmearGate, BigramHash(2048). 3-seed mean: 1.1175 BPB (std 0.0005). No TTT. First VRL result on standard-arch non-TTT frontier.
author: gowtham0992
